founder.label: Founder / Executive
founder.description: Leaders running companies and consulting engagements. Focus on visibility, strategy, team coordination.

sales.label: Sales
sales.description: Sales professionals managing pipelines, accounts, and deals. Focus on opportunity acceleration.

cs.label: Customer Success
cs.description: Account managers and success leads. Focus on retention, expansion, and health tracking.

ops.label: Operations
ops.description: Operations and program managers. Focus on process, reporting, and cross-functional coordination.

marketing.label: Marketing
marketing.description: Marketing and growth professionals. Focus on content, messaging, and performance.

engineering.label: Engineering / Technical
engineering.description: Engineers and tech leads. Focus on code review, documentation, and incident response.

support.label: Support
support.description: Support and customer service teams. Focus on ticket triage, patterns, and escalation.

routines.title: Morning inbox triage
routines.description: Categorize overnight email by urgency, draft replies to obvious ones, surface anything needing decision.

routines.title: Status update for all active client projects
routines.description: Pull last week's work, draft brief status updates for each consulting engagement, note blockers.

routines.title: Weekly review and planning
routines.description: Summarize the week across all projects, flag what didn't get done, draft next week's priorities.

routines.title: Pre-meeting context pull
routines.description: Gather attendee info, recent emails, calendar history, and draft talking points before key meetings.

routines.title: Capture decisions from the week
routines.description: Pull email and meeting notes, extract decisions made, who owns follow-up, archive in decision log.

routines.title: Board/investor update draft
routines.description: Compile metrics, wins, and challenges into a structured board update template with narrative.

routines.title: All-deals pipeline snapshot
routines.description: Extract current CRM state across all clients and opportunities, highlight movement and risk.

routines.title: Weekly pipeline review
routines.description: Pull all open deals, flag stalled ones, identify who needs a push, draft next-step actions.

routines.title: Prospect/account meeting prep
routines.description: Gather CRM history, email threads, mutual connections, and draft agenda or talking points.

routines.title: Draft prospecting sequence
routines.description: From a list of targets, draft personalized outreach emails and follow-up cadence.

routines.title: Automatic follow-up drafts
routines.description: For deals without activity in N days, draft natural follow-up emails ready to send.

routines.title: Enrich prospect data
routines.description: Fill in missing CRM fields (company size, funding, decision-maker titles) from email and web research.

routines.title: Deal summary for CRM update
routines.description: From recent email threads and calls, draft CRM update notes with latest context and next step.

routines.title: Competitive brief on prospect's tech
routines.description: Research prospect's current tools and competitors, draft positioning angles for pitch.

routines.title: Summarize call transcript
routines.description: Extract objections, commitments, and action items from call transcript or notes.

routines.title: Weekly account health summary
routines.description: Pull usage, support tickets, and sentiment, flag at-risk accounts and expansion opportunities.

routines.title: QBR preparation
routines.description: Compile usage metrics, ROI, wins, and upsell opportunities into a structured QBR deck outline.

routines.title: Draft escalation summary
routines.description: Summarize customer issue, impact, and recommended action for escalation to engineering or leadership.

routines.title: Identify churn-risk signals
routines.description: Analyze helpdesk tickets and email for signals of dissatisfaction, flag at-risk accounts.

routines.title: Identify expansion targets
routines.description: From usage and feature adoption, identify high-value customers ready for upsell or land-and-expand.

routines.title: Generate onboarding checklist
routines.description: Create tailored onboarding plan for new customer based on product edition and use case.

routines.title: Draft customer product update
routines.description: Summarize recent feature releases or roadmap changes in customer-friendly language.

routines.title: Renewal timeline and action plan
routines.description: Flag upcoming renewals, assess health, draft win-back or expansion strategy for each.

routines.title: Weekly operational report
routines.description: Compile metrics from tools, summarize cross-functional status, highlight blockers and decisions needed.

routines.title: Organize meeting notes and action items
routines.description: Extract decisions and owners from meeting transcript, format for team distribution.

routines.title: Document a process
routines.description: From existing workflow or email threads, draft a step-by-step process doc with decision trees.

routines.title: Categorize expenses and flag anomalies
routines.description: Classify new expenses, check for budget alignment, flag unusual spend for review.

routines.title: Draft vendor or partner communication
routines.description: From requirements or feedback, draft professional email or RFP for vendor engagement.

routines.title: Collect board package materials
routines.description: Gather KPIs, deck drafts, and narrative updates for board and investor meetings.

routines.title: Cross-functional project status
routines.description: Pull updates from all team trackers, compile unified project health and timeline view.

routines.title: Recruiting brief for open role
routines.description: Summarize role responsibilities, team context, and required skills into hiring brief.

routines.title: Draft content brief
routines.description: From product feature or event, create structured content brief with outline, talking points, and assets.

routines.title: Campaign retrospective and learnings
routines.description: Analyze campaign performance data, extract what worked, what didn't, and recommended next steps.

routines.title: Monthly performance summary
routines.description: Compile website, campaign, and social metrics, highlight trends and recommend optimizations.

routines.title: Competitive messaging scan
routines.description: Research competitor websites and messaging, identify positioning gaps and opportunities.

routines.title: Draft social media calendar
routines.description: Plan month of social posts with themes, assets, and posting schedule.

routines.title: Draft email campaign copy
routines.description: From campaign brief, draft email subject lines, body copy, and CTA variants.

routines.title: Refresh product messaging
routines.description: Update value props, positioning, and differentiators based on latest product changes or market feedback.

routines.title: Webinar prep: slides and talking points
routines.description: Draft webinar outline, slides structure, and speaker notes for upcoming session.

routines.title: PR review preparation
routines.description: Summarize PR context, extract what changed, and draft review comments focusing on critical areas.

routines.title: Generate standup summary
routines.description: Pull recent commits and PRs, draft standup update with progress and blockers.

routines.title: Build incident timeline
routines.description: From Slack or email, reconstruct what happened, when, and why in incident post-mortem format.

routines.title: Generate API or architecture doc
routines.description: From code, extract structure and generate markdown doc with overview, endpoints, and examples.

routines.title: Draft architecture decision doc
routines.description: From PR or discussion, formalize architecture decision with problem, options, and rationale.

routines.title: Test coverage analysis
routines.description: Review test metrics, identify coverage gaps, flag areas needing test investment.

routines.title: Tech debt inventory and prioritization
routines.description: From issue tracker and code, catalog tech debt, estimate effort, recommend priority order.

routines.title: New engineer onboarding guide
routines.description: Draft setup instructions, repo overview, and troubleshooting guide for new team members.

routines.title: Daily ticket triage
routines.description: Review new tickets, categorize by severity, assign priority, route to right owner.

routines.title: Draft KB article from ticket
routines.description: From resolved ticket, create self-service article to prevent repeat questions.

routines.title: Identify support patterns
routines.description: Analyze tickets from past week, flag recurring issues and themes for product/engineering.

routines.title: Escalation summary for engineering
routines.description: Summarize customer issue, reproduction steps, and business impact for bug escalation.

routines.title: Draft customer-facing response
routines.description: From ticket context, draft empathetic, clear response with next steps.

routines.title: Weekly SLA compliance report
routines.description: Track response and resolution times, flag SLA misses and team capacity issues.

routines.title: Update FAQ from tickets
routines.description: Extract top new questions from tickets, update FAQ with clear answers.

routines.title: Onboarding QA checklist
routines.description: Generate customer onboarding checklist based on product and use case.
